title: Explore the Volcano
instructions: Tap the gentle spots to explore. There is no wrong way.

hotspots.label: Steam
hotspots.revealText: Steam rises and floats away — feelings can move through us too.

hotspots.label: Ground
hotspots.revealText: Leo felt steady ground beneath him when he sat down.

hotspots.label: Heart
hotspots.revealText: Kindness toward yourself is always allowed.
